The Wedding

Three days
to remember forever

Victoria and Andrea — lovers of the art of gathering, travel, nature, music, sport and great food — are getting married surrounded by the people they love most, in a magical corner of Sweden. Three days, three identities, one love story.

The Programme

Three days,
three worlds

🇦🇷
Day 1 · June 17
Argentina
Pre-party · Cosy friends
A warm Argentine welcome. Parrilla, mate, bonfire and guitar under the Swedish stars.
🇮🇹
Day 2 · June 18
Italia
The Wedding · Main Celebration
Mediterranean elegance. Outdoor ceremony by the lake, prosecco, pasta, tiramisù and dancing till dawn.
🇸🇪
Day 3 · June 19
Midsommar
After-party · Let us know if you want to join!
Flower crowns, midsommarstång, lake dip and a farewell full of gratitude.

Detailed Programme

Every moment,
planned with love

🇦🇷
Argentina
Tuesday, June 17 · Welcome · Cosy Friends
▼
Dress code: relaxed and comfortable — your best self
🎶 Folklore · Tango · Rock · Cumbia
🍴 Argentine buffet, Danish style
15:00
Welcome gathering
Vermouth, fresh juices and fruit. Everyone together for the first time — soft music to break the ice and start the warmth.
aperitivosocial
16:00–18:00
Outdoor activity
Walk around the property + photo hunt in 'Argentine character' mode. Photos shared at dinner via the collaborative album.
activitynaturephotos
18:00–21:00
Argentine buffet 🔥
Full parrilla (vegan option included), empanadas, Russian salad, homemade bread, chimichurri, grilled onions. Malbec and white wine.
dinnerparrillamalbec
21:00 →
Bonfire with guitar 🔥
Songs from here and there, laughter and connection. The fire as an excuse to come closer.
live musicbonfire
🇮🇹
Italia
Wednesday, June 18 · The Wedding · Ceremony & Celebration
▼
Dress code: summer formal — linen, white, soft tones
🎶 Italian playlist · Live band · DJ
🍴 Italian buffet, Danish style
08:30–10:30
Breakfast buffet
Homemade organic breakfast from local produce is served.
breakfastespresso
10:30–12:00
Free time
Optional yoga, getting ready. The moment of hair, suits, nerves and emotion.
12:00–13:00
Witnesses gathering + rehearsal
A symbolic rehearsal of the ceremony. Backstage photos.
ceremonywitnesses
14:00–15:00
✨ Symbolic ceremony
Outdoors by the lake. The moment. Live tattoo artist as a permanent memory of this day — while guests begin with the aperitivos.
ceremonylakesidelive tattoo
15:00–16:30
Prosecco toast
Mediterranean aperitivos.
toastprosecco
18:30–21:30
Grand Italian dinner 🍝
To be defined… (which is a fancy way of saying we have no idea 😅)
dinnerpastatiramisù
During dinner
Speeches + Trivia
Guest speeches + trivia game "How well do you know them?" — questions about the couple to share laughs together.
speechesgame
20:30
Live band
The moment everything ignites.
live music
21:30–01:00
Dance & Party naked 🎉
The couple opens the dance floor. DJ follows: tarantella, cumbia, techno, tango and whatever the night calls for 🕺
dancingdjparty
00:30 – 02:00
After party
Board games, soft music for those who want to wind down. The night is yours until 02:00.
🇸🇪
Midsommar
Thursday, June 19 · After-party · Let us know if you want to join!
▼
Dress code: bright and pastel colours — flower crowns very welcome
🎶 Swedish folk · Nordic dances · Acoustic
🍴 Swedish Midsommar buffet
09:00–10:30
Breakfast / Brunch
Eggs, gravlax, dark bread, yogurt, jams, coffee. Total calm.
brunchgravlax
10:30–12:00
Botanical walk + flower crown workshop
We head out to gather wildflowers and make our own crowns together in the garden.
natureflowersworkshop
12:00–13:30
Raising of the Midsommarstång 🌿
Swedish tradition at its finest. Dancing around the maypole — yes, including the frog dance. No one is exempt.
traditiondancingmidsommar
15:30–17:00
Traditional games
Kubb, sack race, jump rope, frisbee, football, volleyball, Swedish bocce. Whatever the group invents.
kubbgamesoutdoors
17:00–18:30
Lake dip 🌊
Jump in the lake — for the brave ones.
lakenordic

Getting to Osaby

How to
get there

🚂

From Copenhagen

  • 1
    Train from København H to Växjö C Station — approx. 2h 20min via Öresundståg / SJ.
  • 2
    From Växjö: 13 minutes by car to Osaby Säteri.
  • 3
    We can organise shared lifts from the station — or rent a car in Växjö (Europcar, Hertz available).
✈️

From Italy & Argentina

  • 1
    Fly to Copenhagen (CPH) or Malmö (MMX) — many connections from Rome, Milan and Buenos Aires.
  • 2
    From the airport, take the direct train to København H and follow the route above.
  • 3
    Alternatively: direct flight to Växjö Kronoberg Airport (VXO) if a connection is available.
🚗

Coordinating arrivals

We'll set up a group to coordinate train times and share car rides from Växjö. If you're arriving by train, let us know and we'll sort the transfer. If you prefer freedom, rent a car and enjoy the Swedish countryside on your own terms.

Accommodation

Where to
sleep

Options for every style. The important thing is that no one goes without a bed (unless they want to 🏕️).

🌿

Stjärnviks Säteri

In Tävelsås, a few minutes away. 5 double rooms + 2 rooms with 120 cm beds for the inner circle.

5 doubles + 2 singles
⛺

Tent

For the adventurous — sleeping under the Swedish June sky, where the light barely fades. Bring your tent and join in.

nordic experience
🚐

Van / Camper

Rent a van and park on the grounds. The most free-spirited option — with the best view at breakfast.

wild experience

Nearby Stays

We've handpicked a few Airbnbs and a hotel close to the venue — great options if the main beds fill up. Prices and availability vary, book early!

Dress Code

Come as you are —
wild and beautiful

Bohemian
Gypsy
Free
Natural
🌿
Colours
Earthy tones, warm whites, terracotta, sage green, dusty rose, burnt orange — think nature, not neon.
🪡
Fabrics
Linen, cotton, lace, crochet, chiffon, silk — flowing and breathable. Layers welcome.
💫
Accessories
Flower crowns, leather sandals, stacked jewellery, head scarves, boots — the more character the better.
🚫
Leave at home
Formal suits and black-tie. This is a celebration in the wild — dress for the forest and the dance floor.

"Wear something you could dance barefoot in, pick flowers in, and still feel like yourself at midnight."

The Venue

Osaby Säteri,
Sweden

A historic Swedish manor estate surrounded by forest and a private lake — the perfect setting for three days of love, music and nature.

The beautiful details

The extras
that add magic

📸Collaborative photo albumEveryone's photos via QR — your shots in the shared album.
📖Wishes bookOn paper, for the messages that don't belong on a screen.
🖍️Kids' playgroundA fun space for the little ones to play and explore.
🪞Memory cornerPhotos of the couple and their families through the years.
🏐Free sportsFrisbee, football, volleyball, Swedish bocce, lake swimming — always welcome.
🎨Live tattooDuring Day 2's ceremony — a permanent memory of the day.

Honeymoon Fund

A gift
from the heart

"The greatest gift you can give us is sharing in our memories — if you'd like to contribute to our honeymoon adventure, we've left our bank details here."

We're planning a month-long honeymoon in the Philippines — a full month, with our destination decided by a coin flip: heads or tails will choose where we go next, haha!
